retrieved_result: What to Say When Someone Is Sick With a Serious Health Condition (and Topics to Avoid) i Stock/mixmike When our loved ones are sick, we are desperate to find ways to comfort them. Often, our fumbling attempts at solace fall flat. Here are a few do’s and don’ts to help you know what to say and do to comfort the sick people in your life. DON’T ask what you can do to help. Patients don’t
